title: sauropus lissocarpus
intro: Sauropus lissocarpus, also known as the Lakshmi varmam or Lakshmi plant, is a small, perennial shrub native to tropical forests in India. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antibacterial activities. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, including fever, arthritis, and respiratory problems, due to its potential health benefits such as reducing inflammation and improving immune function. Sauropus lissocarpus is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and its herbal preparations are typically consumed as teas, infusions, or tonics.
